## Environment

If the bug is in the desktop app, run from a terminal so you can see the log:
  trellis 2>&1 | tee /tmp/trellis.log

If it's a device-side issue, the device's serial output and the desktop app's
Recent Logs panel for that device are both useful. Paste the relevant lines below.
